service: aaryaa-network-backend

frameworkVersion: "4"

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: ap-south-1
  stage: prod
  timeout: 29
  memorySize: 512
  environment:
    NODE_ENV: production
    MONGO_URI: ${env:MONGO_URI}
    JWT_SECRET: ${env:JWT_SECRET}
    ALLOW_PUBLIC_ADMIN_REGISTER: ${env:ALLOW_PUBLIC_ADMIN_REGISTER, 'false'}
    CLIENT_URL: ${env:CLIENT_URL}
    EMAIL_USER: ${env:EMAIL_USER}
    EMAIL_PASS: ${env:EMAIL_PASS}
    RECEIVER_EMAIL: ${env:RECEIVER_EMAIL}

functions:
  api:
    handler: server.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /
          method: ANY
      - httpApi:
          path: /{proxy+}
          method: ANY

package:
  patterns:
    - "!uploads/**"
    - "!.env"
